commands_run: pip install pyflakes radon pip-audit mypy pytest-cov -q
python3 -m mypy src/ --ignore-missing-imports  →  Success: no issues found in 35 source files
python3 -m mypy src/  →  Found 7 errors in 3 files
python3 -m radon cc src/ -a  →  Average complexity: A (2.951)
ruff check src/ tests/  →  Found 27 errors
pip-audit -r requirements.txt  →  No known vulnerabilities found

anomalies_found.title: 27 ruff lint violations in test suite (F401/F811/F841)
anomalies_found.evidence: 27 findings in 13 test files; 23 auto-fixable; pyflakes src/ passes
anomalies_found.root_cause: No ruff gate on tests; unused imports accumulated from refactors
anomalies_found.blast_radius: CI lint gate non-compliance; dead imports mask brittle tests

anomalies_found.title: 4 source files below 90% coverage threshold
anomalies_found.root_cause: Tests mock at call_llm() level above provider-dispatch/error-handler/network code
anomalies_found.blast_radius: Production fallback paths untested; quant_agent._parse_proposal error path latent bug risk

anomalies_found.title: mypy strict mode fails with 7 import-untyped errors (ta/pandas/yfinance/requests)
anomalies_found.evidence: 7 errors in 3 files: indicators.py (ta/pandas), market_feed.py (yfinance), get-model-list.py (requests)
anomalies_found.root_cause: Missing stub packages in requirements.txt; no [tool.mypy] config for per-module suppression
anomalies_found.blast_radius: Type gate cannot run without --ignore-missing-imports suppression

anomalies_found.title: src/get-model-list.py uses os.environ.get() — violates Secrets Policy
anomalies_found.evidence: Line 6: API_KEY = os.environ.get('OPENROUTER_API_KEY'); file not in CLAUDE.md arch; makes live HTTP calls
anomalies_found.root_cause: Ad-hoc utility script added without security review; bypasses Settings pydantic-settings
anomalies_found.blast_radius: Secrets policy violation; sets precedent; latent key exposure; bypasses openrouter_client.py

anomalies_found.title: orchestrator.py docstring + ARCHITECTURE.md show stale 8-phase cycle
anomalies_found.evidence: Both show QUANT_DESIGN→RISK_EVALUATE (missing RISK_HARD_GATE) and phantom LEARN phase
anomalies_found.root_cause: Docstring/ARCHITECTURE.md predate RISK_HARD_GATE; LEARN planned but never implemented
anomalies_found.blast_radius: Wrong mental model; RISK_HARD_GATE 'is FINAL' invariant invisible in docs

anomalies_found.title: pyproject.toml requires-python='>=3.12' but runtime is Python 3.11.15
anomalies_found.evidence: Python 3.11.15 runtime vs requires-python='>=3.12'; 368 tests pass; no 3.12-only syntax detected
anomalies_found.root_cause: Runtime provisioned with Python 3.11 despite CLAUDE.md declaring 'Runtime: Python 3.12'
anomalies_found.blast_radius: pip install . fails on Python 3.11; potential behavioral divergences

observations.title: Open PR #83 (codex stale audit memory dump) unmerged
